title: State regulators object to Treasury imposing OCC stablecoin rules on states
snippet: The Conference of State Bank Supervisors (CSBS) has provided comments to the US Treasury on its proposed rulemaking for state issued stablecoins under the GENIUS Act. title: Major US banks to launch tokenised deposit network in 2027
snippet: US banks JP Morgan, Citi, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo are reportedly releasing a tokenised deposit system in 2027 in response to the stablecoin boom.

title: Hong Kong taps JPMorgan, HSBC for expert group to scale tokenized bonds
snippet: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority announced the formation of an expert group to advance the development of tokenized bonds.

title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
snippet: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.

title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
snippet: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.

title: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party

title: Airwallex buys financial data automation platform Leapfin
snippet: Business payments outfit Airwallex has acquired Leapfin, a financial data automation platform specialising in revenue recognition and reconciliation. Financial terms were not disclosed.
